title: Polish Fish Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Chinese-inspired stew made with Polish sausage, fish, and vegetables.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the Polish sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the fish and cook until opaque, about 3 minutes.
Add the fish sauce, garlic, and stew vegetables, and stir to combine.
Add 2 cups of water to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Season with soy sauce to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped green onions if desired.
